task_completion.description: Create a new tiddler named 'Energy Comparison Dashboard'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title field in edit mode or the header in view mode displays exactly 'Energy Comparison Dashboard'.
A tag pill labeled 'Dashboard' is visible on the tiddler.

task_completion.description: Provide a mechanism to select two energy sources
task_completion.visual_evidence: Two dropdown menus are visible in the tiddler's view/preview mode, or '<$select' widgets are visible in the wikitext.

task_completion.description: The selection mechanism targets tiddlers tagged 'EnergySource'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The dropdown menus show options like 'Solar Power', 'Wind Power', 'Geothermal Energy', and 'Hydroelectric Power', or the wikitext contains a filter like '[tag[EnergySource]]'.

task_completion.description: Transclude the content of the selected tiddlers
task_completion.visual_evidence: The actual text/content of the selected energy sources is visible in the dashboard, or '<$transclude' / '{{...}}' widgets linked to a state tiddler (e.g., '$:/state/...') are visible in the wikitext.

task_completion.description: Display the two selected energy sources simultaneously side-by-side
task_completion.visual_evidence: The preview or view mode shows the content arranged in two parallel columns, or the wikitext contains HTML/CSS for a side-by-side layout (e.g., flexbox, grid, or column classes).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the TiddlyWiki application via a web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a web browser interface with TiddlyWiki loaded, rather than terminal commands bypassing the UI.

integrity.description: The agent used dynamic transclusion rather than hardcoding the text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The wikitext uses widgets like <$select> and <$transclude> instead of directly copy-pasting the paragraphs about Solar, Wind, Geothermal, or Hydroelectric power into the dashboard.

integrity.description: The agent created and saved the tiddler within the TiddlyWiki system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The tiddler appears in the TiddlyWiki story river or recent sidebar, confirming it was created in the app and not just mocked up in an external text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Title: 'Energy Comparison Dashboard'. Expected Tag: 'Dashboard'. Source Tag for dropdowns: 'EnergySource'. The wikitext must use '<$select', '<$transclude' (or '{{'), and '$:/state/' to manage the side-by-side comparison dynamically.
